request.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users (WHERE status = 'active' OR WHERE status = 'inactive' OR WHERE 1=1)

request.templateSql:
SELECT id, name FROM users
        <choose>
            <when test="type == 'active'">
                WHERE status = 'active'
            </when>
            <when test="type == 'inactive'">
                WHERE status = 'inactive'
            </when>
            <otherwise>
                WHERE 1=1
            </otherwise>
        </choose>
